title: Employee Salary Calculator
description: Use a struct to store employee data and calculate net salary.
problemStatement:
Model a real-world entity! Create a `struct Employee` with `id`, `name`, and `base_salary`.

Calculate the `net_salary` by adding a 10% bonus to the `base_salary`.

**Expected Output for salary 5000:** `Employee: John, Net Salary: 5500.00`.
hints: Include the bonus calculation as a separate float variable.
Use `%.2f` to format the salary output.
